title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-15
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse checkup
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the greenhouse and checking up on all the community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A robot and Polly the bee acting as gardeners in a digital greenhouse, checking on the health of various code-plants (representing apps).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the cute bee mascot walking through a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a watering can, tending to glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the cute bee mascot walking through a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a watering can, tending to glowing code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
